title: Equipment Spend
query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Price) FROM BuySuit WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS suitSpend, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Price) FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS weaponSpend, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Price) FROM BuySuit WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Price) FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS total

details.text: {suitSpend} Cr spent on suits and {weaponSpend} Cr on weapons during the report period. On-foot gear is a significant credit sink that's easy to lose track of — the combined total validates the grind that funded those upgrades and measures how seriously you've invested in the Odyssey side of the game.
details.help: suitSpend + weaponSpend = total Odyssey gear investment. suitSpend drives the title as the larger category spend.

tagLines: On-foot equipment expenditure compiled. Odyssey gear investment totals noted in the outfitting record.
The suits and weapons cost credits. The effectiveness of the build is the return on that investment.
Odyssey gear is expensive to build properly. This is what you decided was worth spending on.
